docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2024 BY MARY E. WISS. PLAINTIFF VALLICIA JONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AZIEZA JONES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,038.00 FILED BY JONES, VALLICIA AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, AZIEZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
